description: Native English (American, Detroit). Female, mid 50s. High-quality, clear studio sound. Persona: weathered neighborhood grocer. Emotion: dry, matter-of-fact, quietly warm. Low, even chest-toned alto with flat Detroit vowels and a faint Spanish cadence underneath. Short declarative delivery that reports hard news plainly, like small weather, with a held almost-smile under the dryness.
text: Case is down to two doors now. [sighs] Not the compressor... it's the controller. Wants to call home, nobody's home. You want coffee, I'd take it today. [warm] Everybody's house thinks something now.
